title: Umami Light Thai Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai chicken curry featuring dried fruit, with a focus on umami taste and low-fat ingredients. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a dinner party.
instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the saucepan and set aside.
Add the curry paste to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, and salt to the saucepan. Stir to combine.
Add the chopped dried apricots to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the saucepan and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped basil and cilantro leaves.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional basil and cilantro leaves if desired.
